articles.description: At least three UN peacekeepers killed this week as violence surges amid Israel's expanding invasion of southern Lebanon.

topStories.title: Parliament Budget Session updates: Maoism has been almost eradicated from Bastar, the region is now on the path of development, says Amit Shah
topStories.description: Congress MP Digvijaya Singh says CAPF Bill will make the discriminations faced by the officials permanent as RS takes up discussion on CAPF (General Administration) Bill, 2026

topStories.title: Trump interested in Arab partners footing Iran war bill: White House
topStories.description: Trump interested in Arab partners footing Iran war bill White House

topStories.title: Watch | ‘Loser’ Lego Trump receives Iran’s message in satirical video: ‘Come closer’
topStories.description: The animation opens with a Lego version of Trump seated in the Oval Office, appearing under pressure as he gazes out at large crowds protesting outside.

topStories.title: ICE announces death of another Mexican detainee in US immigration custody
topStories.description: Mexico's President Claudia Sheinbaum says her country will take steps to protest death of another Mexican citizen in US.

topStories.title: Congress slams attack on its candidate in Assam election
topStories.description: The convoy of Sunil Kumar Chhetri, the party’s nominee from Naduar seat, was attacked by unidentified men around 3 p.m. when he was travelling for an election campaign; he fell during a scuffle and has been taken to a hospital for treatment

topStories.title: White House ballroom project: Trump reveals military building large complex beneath it, says 'we're ahead of schedule'
topStories.description: US President Trump revealed plans for a large military complex beneath a new ballroom at the White House. The ballroom project, one of the most undertakings at White House in more than a century, has expanded significantly, with its privately funded budget rising from $200 million to $400 million.

topStories.title: Oil Terminal, 90% Crude Exports: What Trump Could Get From Kharg Island
topStories.description: It may be a mere scrap of land, but Kharg handles around 90 per cent of Iran's crude exports.

topStories.title: Explained | Why more Americans are applying for Canadian citizenship after new ancestry law
topStories.description: Millions of Americans are now seeking to apply for Canadian citizenship, provided they can prove direct lineage in the country. But why is there an uptick in US applicants for Canadian citizenship?

topStories.title: ‘Strait of Hormuz will reopen one way or another’, Rubio tells Al Jazeera
topStories.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has told Al Jazeera that the US will not accept Iran’s claim over the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Fire contained after missile attack on oil refinery in Israel’s Haifa
topStories.description: Attack marks second time Oil Refineries facility in northern Israel targeted during US-Israeli war on Iran.

topStories.title: Powell Says Fed Committed To 2% Inflation Target, Flags West Asia Risks
topStories.description: Powell noted that tariffs typically have a one-time impact on inflation and said there is no evidence that the Federal Reserve's past bond-buying programmes significantly contributed to inflation.

topStories.title: Egypt’s president urges Trump to stop war on Iran
topStories.description: Egypt’s President Abdel Fattah el-Sisi has called on Trump to end the war on Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to ‘blow up’ all desalination plants in Iran
dailyNews.description: Legal expert says targeting civilian sites would be 'collective punishment', which is prohibited under laws of war.

dailyNews.title: Is the US ready to invade Iran? What Trump’s moves tell us so far
dailyNews.description: Seizing strategic islands and destroying Iran's stock of enriched uranium are options the US is considering.

dailyNews.title: ‘Loyalty campaign’: Iraqi armed groups in Iran as US talks of ground war
dailyNews.description: Fighters from a major Iraqi pro-Iran armed group have entered the country, carrying aid — and a signal of support.

dailyNews.title: Apple will hide your email address from apps and websites, but not cops
dailyNews.description: Demands for Apple customer records by federal agents in recent months underscore the privacy limitations of email.

dailyNews.title: Marco Rubio says President Trump prefers diplomatic solution to war on Iran
dailyNews.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio said that President Donald Trump still prefers a diplomatic outcome for war on Iran.

dailyNews.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio has outlines what the US’s main demands are for Iran.

dailyNews.title: How the US could try to seize Iran's Kharg Island
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump has indicated he could send troops to take control of Iran's key oil export terminal.

dailyNews.title: 'Like a 6-year-old': Emmy Award-winning host blasts Trump’s word games over Iran 'war'
dailyNews.description: Since the conflict began in late February, when Israel and the US carried out joint military operations on Iran, Trump has refrained from using the word ‘war’.

dailyNews.title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
dailyNews.description: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it.

dailyNews.title: Middle East conflict: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in Iran strikes; minister reiterates anti-war stance
dailyNews.description: Spain has announced the closure of its airspace to US military planes that have been involved in attacking Iran, a move that aims to further reiterate Madrid's anti-war stance.

dailyNews.title: Leavitt calls on Congress to end Easter recess to work on DHS shutdown
dailyNews.description: The White House urges Congress to return from Easter recess to fund DHS, as TSA staffing shortages and long airport security lines persist nationwide.

dailyNews.title: What to know about the Supreme Court’s blockbuster birthright citizenship case
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court hears arguments on birthright citizenship and whether Trump's executive order complies with the 14th Amendment's citizenship clause.

dailyNews.title: Trump DOJ files lawsuit against Minnesota over trans athlete policy
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department on Monday filed a lawsuit against Minnesota over its policy to have transgender athletes compete in girls' and women's sports.

dailyNews.title: Trump Claims ‘Regime Change’ in Iran Is Already Complete
dailyNews.description: President Trump suggested that Iran’s current leaders were “much more reasonable” as he sought to show progress in his war aims. Iran’s power structure appears firmly in control despite a month of U.S.-Israeli attacks.

dailyNews.title: ‘I Think That MAGA Is Dying:’ Inside the Youth Movement at CPAC
dailyNews.description: At a sparsely attended Conservative Political Action Conference, young Republicans were eager to start the post-Trump era.

dailyNews.title: Private-Credit Wobbles Could Prove Perilous for Trump
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is poised to broaden access to risky investments that are showing signs of strain.

dailyNews.title: Texas Border Wall Plan in Big Bend Draws Opposition From Republicans and Democrats
dailyNews.description: Plans for a wall in Big Bend National Park prompted public protests and behind-the-scenes lobbying to sway the Trump administration to stop.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s Birthright Citizenship Order at Supreme Court Splits Conservative Scholars
dailyNews.description: Before President Trump’s order to limit birthright citizenship, there was widespread agreement that the 14th Amendment guaranteed citizenship for U.S.-born babies.

dailyNews.title: Trump says U.S. will destroy Iran’s oil wells, Kharg Island without deal to 'immediately' reopen Hormuz Strait
dailyNews.description: Donald Trump warned the U.S. will completely obliterate all of Iran's electric generating plants, oil wells and Kharg Island if a peace deal is not reached.

dailyNews.title: This is what really causes recessions, a former top Trump White House economist says
dailyNews.description: Recessions are about shocks, and energy is a prime culprit, Tyler Goodspeed says

dailyNews.title: More than 7 million student loan borrowers face deadline to leave Biden-era repayment plan. What to know
dailyNews.description: Student loan borrowers will be removed from the Saving on a Valuable Education, or SAVE, plan, later this year, Trump officials said.
